info.name: RentEverything API Tests
info.description: Automated API tests generated from Swagger docs.

item.name: Verify current user (dev only - auto-verifies email/phone)
Get nearby categories with listing counts
Get all listings for the current host (any status)
Delete a listing (soft delete for hosts, hard delete for admins)
Create slot configuration for a listing
Get available time slots for a specific date
Create a new booking request (status → pending)
Get all bookings for the current user
Host accepts a pending booking (internal: confirmed → displayStatus: accepted)
Host rejects a pending booking (internal: rejected → displayStatus: rejected)
Simulate payment for a confirmed booking (internal: paid → displayStatus: accepted)
Renter or host cancels a booking (internal: cancelled → displayStatus: canceled)
Authorize payment for a booking (renter only)
Cancel payment intent (renter or host, before capture)
Get payment intent for a booking
Flag a listing for review (admin only)
Ledger entries for a booking (admin only)
List payouts, optionally filter by status (admin only)
Create a payout for a host (admin only)
Mark a payout as PAID and post ledger DEBIT (admin only)
Open a dispute on a booking (admin only)
Resolve a dispute on a booking (admin only)
Get all conversations for the current user
